3114690.name: Broken & Loved
3114690.description:
Sinopsis

Broken & Loved is a visual novel which tells the story of  Evangeline and Rei (Default name), two university students who meet each other during their first day of classes, entangling their lives into a love story fill with reflection, drama, sweetness and happiness.

Charming characters

Evangeline is a 23 year old girl who seems to be nervous, insecure, shy and introvert all the time, with great passion for art and a lot of bottled feelings about to explode.

Rei is a 21 years old guy or girl who always tries to see the good side of things, charming and honest, the player's character. A lot of their characteristics are define by the player's actions.

Through the main story there will be side characters, each one with their own stories and dilemas. These characters will have their own optional events without interfering with the main story.

Versatile main character

The player can choose Rei's name, what they like and their passions; Which type of videogames they like, their favorite book genre, favorite food among other things, as well as choosing other characteristics like their relationship with their parents, the future they want and even more.

Dynamic story

Great part of the story and dialogues will change depending on Rei's gender, characteristics and player's decisions, with multiple endings, optional events and different routes.

Enjoy the replayability and experience different playthoughs.

Interacciones variadas

Besos, caricias, tomarse de las manos, multiples interacciones con una gran cantidad de diálogos que se expanden y cambian según el progreso de la historia.

Interacciones variadas

Kisses, groping, headpats, hand-holding, multiple interactions with a great amount of dialogue which expand and change through the main story.

Sandbox

After certain point in the main story, the player will be able to freely interact with Evangeline as much as they want, choosing the order of future events and different routes after repeating some of them.

Characteristics

  • Sweet vanilla romance.

  • Fun and playful interactions.

  • Uncensored headpats.

  • Great replayability.
3114690.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
